programme.title: Live Test Cricket
programme.sub-title: Live Test: India v South Africa
programme.desc: India v South Africa. Coverage of the fourth day of the Second and Final Test of the series, which takes place at ACA Stadium in Guwahati. The last Test series between these two teams ended in a 1-1 draw in January 2024, as India fought back to level a two-match contest. South Africa won the First Test by an innings and 32 runs in Centurion before India came out on top in the second game thanks to a seven-wicket win
